meaning: Ultimate bragging rights for whoever owns the eventual champions.
For getting agonisingly close to glory and missing out.
For backing the underdog behind the tournament's biggest shock result.
For thumping an opponent by the widest margin of any match.
Consolation prize for owning the tournament's worst-performing team.
For the most controversial or unlucky exit from the tournament.
For quietly out-scoring everyone across all three teams.
winnerRule: Person whose teams earn the most total points
